description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the ros2-development branch and allows manual triggering. The workflow has read-all permissions and a single job called build that runs on a matrix of ROS distributions (rolling, iron, humble) and OS (ubuntu-22.04). The job checks out the repository, sets up a ROS2 workspace, checks copyright and line-endings, builds ROS2, builds RealSense SDK 2.0 from source, builds the RealSense ROS2 wrapper, installs packages for tests, runs tests, and runs integration tests.
